sentence: The following words and terms shall, for the purposes of this section and as used elsewhere in this code requirements, have the meanings shown herein.
A product that is dispensed from an aerosol container by a propellant.
Aerosol products shall be classified by means of the calculation of their chemical heats of combustion and shall be designated Level 1, 2 or 3.
A metal can or a glass or plastic bottle designed to dispense an aerosol.
Metal cans shall be limited to a maximum size of 1,000 ml.
Glass or plastic bottles shall be limited to a maximum size of 118 ml.
The temperature at which the vapor pressure of a liquid equals the atmospheric pressure of 101 kPa gage or 760 mm of mercury.
